# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent memcached exposed port.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: memcached-config
  namespace: production
data:
  memcached.conf: |
    -m 256
    -c 1024
    -t 4
    -R 200
    -n 72
    -f 1.25
    -v
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: memcached-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
              tier: frontend
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: background-worker
              tier: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
              tier: frontend
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: background-worker
              tier: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: web-application-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: memcached
              tier: cache
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: background-worker
              tier: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5555
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: worker-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
      tier: worker
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
              tier: frontend
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5555
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: memcached
              tier: cache
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
      annotations:
        seccomp.security.alpha.kubernetes.io/pod: runtime/default
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 11211
        runAsGroup: 11211
        fsGroup: 11211
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          command:
            - memcached
            - "-l"
            - "0.0.0.0"
            - "-p"
            - "11211"
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
            - "-t"
            - "4"
            - "-U"
            - "0"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
              protocol: TCP
              name: memcached
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 300Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcached
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcached
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 10Mi
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchExpressions:
                    - key: app
                      operator: In
                      values:
                        - memcached
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: memcached-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      serviceAccountName: web-application-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: web-application
          image: web-application:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: WORKER_HOST
              value: "worker-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: ENVIRONMENT
              value: "production"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: app-cache
              mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 50Mi
        - name: app-cache
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-application-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: web-application-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: web-application-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-worker
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
      tier: worker
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
        tier: worker
        environment: production
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      serviceAccountName: background-worker-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: background-worker
          image: background-worker:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5555
              protocol: TCP
              name: worker
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: ENVIRONMENT
              value: "production"
            - name: WORKER_CONCURRENCY
              value: "4"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: worker
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: worker
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: worker-data
              mountPath: /app/data
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 50Mi
        - name: worker-data
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 200Mi
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchExpressions:
                    - key: app
                      operator: In
                      values:
                        - background-worker
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: worker-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-worker
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: background-worker
    tier: worker
  ports:
    - name: worker
      port: 5555
      targetPort: 5555
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: background-worker-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-worker
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: background-worker-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
      tier: worker
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: web-application-hpa
  namespace: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: web-application
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 1
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 60
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 60
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: background-worker-hpa
  namespace: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: background-worker
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 8
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 75
  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 1
          periodSeconds: 60
